app.name: SunCo Ticket Creator
app.short_description: Create SunCo-linked tickets from the sidebar
app.long_description: Allows agents to manually create new Zendesk tickets linked to Sunshine Conversations, enabling in-app messaging with end users.
app.installation_instructions: Enter your Sunshine Conversations App ID, Key ID, and Key Secret.

suncoKeyId.label: SunCo Key ID
suncoKeyId.helpText: Your Sunshine Conversations API Key ID

suncoKeySecret.label: SunCo Key Secret
suncoKeySecret.helpText: Your Sunshine Conversations API Key Secret
